quick_start.userFacingRole: Start quickly with basic local review and simple Ask Ross actions
quick_start.technicalRole: command routing, short summaries, basic local Q&A, local public-law query shaping

case_associate.userFacingRole: Recommended private assistant for most matters
case_associate.technicalRole: default legal document assistant, document review, drafting, source-backed Ask Ross

senior_drafting_support.userFacingRole: Advanced private assistant for deeper review and drafting
senior_drafting_support.technicalRole: advanced drafting, chronology refinement, issue extraction, deeper matter reasoning

singleRuntimeFallback.technicalRole: local embeddings and RAG retrieval through Gemma 4 Q4 runtime
